notes: v0.16.62 — MODULES library redesign: RARITY TIERS. The right-hand library panel on the MODULES page used to be a 4-column hex grid that was cramped in the narrow side panel and hid the rarity hierarchy. It's now a vertical stack of 5 tier sections (LEGENDARY → COMMON) with a rarity-colored header per section (showing owned/total) and compact full-width chips inside each tier — left rarity stripe + hex+glyph icon + name + slot tag, ×N count chip top-right for duplicates, gold EQUIPPED marker bottom-right when equipped, dim LOCKED stamp for unowned. Hover, click→compare, drag-to-equip and the rich tooltip all carry over. Left blueprint side (ship + slots) is untouched per spec. Windows only.
